hero.title: Ensuring Data Sovereignty
hero.subtitle: Next-Gen Local Solutions
hero.description: LINGSSOFT creates a world where your data remains yours, without cloud dependency. Experience local-centric innovation combining powerful security and AI.

ai.title: ECO AI DevOps Appliance
ai.description: An on-premise specialized AI-driven DevOps solution promising sustainable energy efficiency and data security.

slides.label: ECO Resource Management
slides.title: A New Standard for Energy Efficiency
slides.description: Minimize power consumption and realize digital carbon neutrality with cutting-edge technology.

cards.title: Idle mode control algorithm
cards.description: Detects real-time usage to eliminate unnecessary power consumption and intelligently reallocates computing resources.

cards.title: Resource scheduling
cards.description: Allocates hardware resources optimized for workloads to reduce overhead and maximize operational cost savings.

cards.title: Process scheduling
cards.description: Effectively distributes system load to enhance processing performance and support low-carbon, sustainable business management.

slides.label: On-premise Innovation
slides.title: Perfect Security Environment
slides.description: Thoroughly manage corporate data internally to guarantee robust information sovereignty.

cards.title: Enhanced Security
cards.description: Establishes an air-gap environment isolated from external networks to fundamentally block all abnormal access and intrusion threats.

cards.title: Protection
cards.description: Provides powerful on-premise encryption and distribution control systems to prevent the leakage of core technologies and intellectual assets.

cards.title: Control
cards.description: Ensures transparent management and complete control over data usage by tracking and visualizing all internal data flows in real-time.

slides.label: AI-based DevOps
slides.title: Maximizing Development Productivity
slides.description: Helping developers focus on creativity by automating complex operations with AI.

cards.title: Automation
cards.description: Intelligent AI automates repetitive infrastructure setup and build processes, dramatically reducing pipeline construction time.

cards.title: Speed
cards.description: Simplifies complex procedures through optimized deployment strategies, accelerating the product's time-to-market.

cards.title: Quality
cards.description: Prevents errors proactively through AI-driven continuous monitoring and automated testing, ensuring service continuity and stability.

energy.title: Energy Efficiency - ECO Resource Management
energy.description: Utilizes cutting-edge ECO Resource Management technology to efficiently allocate computing resources and dramatically reduce power consumption. Optimizes infra costs and provides a sustainable digital environment.

sovereignty.title: Data Sovereignty - On-premise Environment
sovereignty.description: Completely control the flow of data within your organization. By fundamentally blocking any possibility of external leaks, we securely protect your most valuable asset—your data.

usability.title: DevOps Innovation - AI DevOps
usability.description: Innovates complex development pipelines and infrastructure configurations through AI-driven automation. We build an environment where developers can focus solely on creating core value.

items.title: Integrated Solution Supply
items.description: From field-ready hardware-integrated appliances to optimized software packages, we offer integrated supply solutions tailored to your enterprise size.

items.title: Delivering Sustainable Value
items.description: Lower the initial introduction burden through flexible subscription licenses and experience the latest AI technology that is continuously updated throughout its lifecycle.

items.title: Specialized Tech Partnership
items.description: Going beyond simple support, we accompany you on your successful digital transformation journey through custom implementations optimized for your environment and dedicated engineer consulting.

items.title: Trust-Based Market Value
items.description: We offer proven value in public and financial markets where security and trust are essential, positioning ourselves as the standard for next-generation local AI technology.

security.title: Enterprise Security Suite
security.description: From process monitoring to document security. Protect all corporate digital assets seamlessly. All logs and monitoring data remain safely isolated within your organization.

slides.label: Real-time Protection
slides.title: Perfect Process Monitoring
slides.description: Monitor all computing resources and network flows in real-time to detect abnormal behavior immediately.

cards.title: Process Management
cards.description: Empowers system-core level process tracking to fundamentally block unauthorized executions and proactively defend against potential malicious activities.

cards.title: Network Analysis
cards.description: Analyzes all packet flows between internal infra and external networks to detect data leakage attempts and intelligently monitor unauthorized communications.

cards.title: Threat Detection
cards.description: Leverages an intelligent engine to capture signs of intrusion or exploits in real-time, providing immediate alerts and response guides to minimize risk.

slides.label: Document Security Innovation
slides.title: Enterprise-grade DRM
slides.description: Provide strong encryption and access control throughout the lifecycle of critical documents.

cards.title: Document Encryption
cards.description: Applies automated, high-strength encryption from the moment of creation, ensuring data remains protected even in the event of unauthorized external disclosure.

cards.title: Access Control
cards.description: Strictly governs detailed document actions—read, edit, print—based on user roles and seniority to prevent misuse of sensitive internal information.

cards.title: Traceability
cards.description: Records and visualizes the complete lifecycle of critical documents, including creation, movement, and deletion, to maximize transparency in data management.

slides.label: Data Sovereignty
slides.title: Integrated Log Analysis
slides.description: Centralize all security logs internally to maximize compliance and post-analysis efficiency.

cards.title: Log Integration
cards.description: Aggregates vast security log data scattered across servers, networks, and endpoints into a single local system, providing a comprehensive security dashboard.

cards.title: Internal Isolation
cards.description: Securely isolates and stores all sensitive security data within the enterprise’s independent, closed repository—never on the cloud—to fully safeguard information sovereignty.

cards.title: Analysis
cards.description: Provides advanced search and visualization tools to accurately identify root causes during incidents and generate rich analytical reports for compliance.

monitoring.title: Intelligent Real-time Monitoring
monitoring.description: Proactively detect unknown threats through AI-based pattern analysis. Trace all process activities to eliminate security blind spots.

protection.title: Integrity Document Security (DRM)
protection.description: Control all document-related actions such as editing, printing, and capturing. Provide a strong shield for data ownership.

compliance.title: Compliance & Governance
compliance.description: Build an integrated management system that complies with privacy laws and security regulations. Protect data value completely.

items.title: Thorough Internal Control
items.description: Physically and logically block all unauthorized access to protect core technical competitiveness.

items.title: Custom Security Design
items.description: Build custom security systems that don't hinder productivity by analyzing unique business environments.

items.title: Rapid Incident Response
items.description: Visualize all data for immediate analysis and support systematic post-incident measures.

items.title: Continuous Security Upgrades
items.description: Maintain the highest security levels through regular updates and expert consulting against evolving threats.

education.title: EduTech Platform
education.description: A standalone online education system for freelance tutors. Own and manage student data and teaching materials directly without platform dependency.

slides.label: My Own Branded Education
slides.title: White-label Online Classroom
slides.description: Establish an educational environment with your unique brand, rather than the platform's logo, providing a professional experience for your students.

cards.title: Brand Customization
cards.description: Operate independent educational sites by setting your own logo, theme colors, and domain without being dependent on large platforms.

cards.title: Responsive Interface
cards.description: Maximize student accessibility through a user experience optimized for all devices, including mobile and tablets.

cards.title: Instructor Dashboard
cards.description: Easily handle complex operational tasks through an intuitive interface, from course setup to student management.

slides.label: Ensure Data Sovereignty
slides.title: Local Learning Data Management
slides.description: Don't leave valuable teaching materials and student data to external clouds. Own and manage your data in a sovereignty-centric environment.

cards.title: Strong Data Security
cards.description: Fundamentally prevent data leakage to large platforms by isolating personal info and learning history locally.

cards.title: Autonomous Data Use
cards.description: Freely extract and analyze accumulated learning data to provide customized learning prescriptions specialized for your students.

cards.title: Platform Independence
cards.description: Permanently own and operate all built systems and data without worrying about platform policy changes or fee increases.

slides.label: Maximize Learning Effects
slides.title: Real-time Interactive Teaching Tools
slides.description: Enhance learning efficiency by providing high-performance video class tools and two-way communication that feels just like in-person.

cards.title: HD Video Lectures
cards.description: Conduct high-quality two-way classes with dozens of students simultaneously using a low-latency high-performance media engine.

cards.title: Digital Writing System
cards.description: Utilize real-time shared whiteboards and various writing tools to visually communicate and explain abstract concepts clearly.

cards.title: Real-time Participation
cards.description: Increase student immersion and encourage active participation through various interactive features like quizzes and polls.

branding.title: Independent Brand Strengthening
branding.description: Increase student loyalty and create differentiated educational value through a white-label platform reflecting the instructor's unique philosophy.

data.title: Restoring Data Sovereignty
data.description: Maintain the value of data by managing all learning records and content directly on local systems, reducing platform dependency.

interaction.title: Innovating Interactive Experience
interaction.description: Break the constraints of time and space using cutting-edge interactive technology to realize one-on-one customized learning environments.

items.title: Autonomous Business Model
items.description: Improve profitability through a commission-free independent system and freely explore various educational business ideas.

items.title: Scalable System Architecture
items.description: Flexibly scale the system as the student base grows and immediately reflect the latest EdTech technologies.

items.title: Specialized Operating Partnership
items.description: Beyond just providing a platform, we offer technical consulting and close support from dedicated engineers for a successful online environment.

items.title: Reliable Education Partner
items.description: Based on stability and security proven in numerous fields, we create an environment where you can focus solely on the essence of education.
